note: Cross-file LLM05: model_suggestion (in _support_planner.py) returns LLM output; the sink file passes `s` to subprocess(shell=True). Sink file alone shows only `s = model_suggestion(...)`. To know `s` is MODEL output (untrusted per ai-llm), the agent must read _support_planner. Benign validates against an allowlist (argv, no shell).
